name: simple-gstack-en
description: Claude Code adaptation of gstack engineering workflow skills: plan, implement, review, QA, ship, investigate, design, and more.

interface.shortDescription: Engineering workflow skills: plan, build, review, QA, ship.
interface.longDescription: A port of the simple-gstack-en plugin for Claude Code. File-first engineering workflow with planning, implementation, review, QA, security audit, design, and release skills — adapted from Codex to Claude Code conventions.
defaultPrompt: Use /sg-plan to create or refresh the active context eng-plan.md for this task.
Use /sg-tasks to turn an approved eng-plan.md into tasks.md and sprint.md.
Use /sg-implement to execute from plan with minimal diffs and tests.
Use /sg-review to review the current diff for production risks.
Use /sg-qa to reproduce, fix, and regression-test bugs.
